seoTitle: Apsley vs Arthur River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Apsley and Arthur River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Apsley vs Arthur River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Apsley and Arthur River.
heading: Apsley vs Arthur River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Apsley, Tasmania and Arthur River, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Apsley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Arthur River (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Apsley or Arthur River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Apsley has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Arthur River scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Apsley scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Arthur River scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Apsley or Arthur River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Apsley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
